title: crotalaria pilosa
intro: Crotalaria pilosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the hairy rattlebox or hairy crotalaria. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots, leaves, and seeds being used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria pilosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, while its leaves and seeds are used in traditional remedies for their medicinal and therapeutic properties.
